Name: FSlateFontInfo
Description: A representation of a font in Slate.

Variables.Name: FontObject
Variables.Description: The font object (valid when used from UMG or a Slate widget style asset)

Variables.Name: FontMaterial
Variables.Description: The material to use when rendering this font

Variables.Name: OutlineSettings
Variables.Description: Settings for applying an outline to a font

Variables.Name: TypefaceFontName
Variables.Description: The name of the font to use from the default typeface (None will use the first entry)

Variables.Name: Size
Variables.Description:
The font size is a measure in point values.  The conversion of points to Slate Units is done at 96 dpi.  So if 
	  you're using a tool like Photoshop to prototype layouts and UI mock ups, be sure to change the default dpi 
	  measurements from 72 dpi to 96 dpi.
	  手机端无法渲染过大的字体图集，且出于内存考虑也不宜将字体设置过大。若有大字体需求，请用小字体+调整Scale的方案。 See MAXFONTSIZE

Variables.Name: Hinting_DEPRECATED
Variables.Description: The hinting algorithm to use with the font
